name: a foreign project's overlay is not included when aggregating for a different project (blast-radius scoping)
command: ID=P556A03; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id sid --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; NN=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --project OTHER-556 --format json 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["rules"].select{|x|x["origin"]=="project"}.length'); rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$NN" = 0 ] && echo foreign-project-excluded 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' 'Always bind a unique key to every loop element.' 'Never combine conditional and loop on one element.' > g.txt
